findings.message: Added devDependencies: vitest@4.1.5, @vitejs/plugin-react@6.0.1, @testing-library/react@16.3.2, @testing-library/jest-dom@6.9.1, jsdom@29.1.0. All are devDependencies (zero production bundle impact). All are standard, well-maintained packages for the Vitest + React Testing Library stack specified in CLAUDE.md. No duplicate functionality introduced. No licence concerns (all MIT). pnpm audit should be run in CI to confirm no CVEs.
